response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical segments. 2. Identified the song "群青賛歌" by Eve as the main performance. 3. Identified the song "六兆年と一夜物語" by Kemu during the solo performance. 4. Conducted web searches to confirm composer and retrieve the full lyrics for both songs in Japanese. 5. Translated/compiled English lyrics for both songs. 6. Constructed the final JSON response based on the scene mapping and lyrics data.
response.global_summary: The video features a vocal performance of the song "群青賛歌" (Gunjo Sanka) by a trio of VTubers, followed by a solo performance of "六兆年と一夜物語" (Rokuchounen to Ichiya Monogatari).

scenes.description: A trio of VTubers performs the song "群青賛歌" (Gunjo Sanka) on a brightly lit stage with balloons and screen projections.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
繋がっていたいって 信じられる言葉
だってもう昨日の僕らにおさらば
青い春を過ごした 遠い稲妻
さっと泣いて 前だけを向けたら
きっとどんなに楽になれていたろうな
この心を揺らした 一縷の望みは
ないものねだりは辞めた 未完成人間
素晴らしき世界だけが 答えを握ってる
諦めてしまうほど この先沢山の
後悔が君を待ってるけど
もうない 迷いはしないよ
この傷も愛しく 思えてしまうほど
重ねてしまうよ 不格好なまんまでいいから
走れ その歩幅で 走れ 声轟かせてくれ
期待と不安を同じくらい抱きしめて
君と今を紡ぐ未来照らして
顔も名前も知らない僕たちが
たった1つの音をかき鳴らす
いたずらみたいな奇跡のような刹那
あっという間に流れる時が
ありのままで在り続ける怖さが
失った時間は取り戻せないけれど
過去を振り返ってばかりじゃ 泣いたっていいんだ
悔しさと痛みだけが 君を肯定するから
大人になったら 忘れてしまうの
君との約束をした場所は
もうない 覚えていたいよ
思い出も愛しく 思えてしまうほど
重ねてしまうよ 不格好なまんまでいいから
その声はどこまでも鳴り響いて
確かな理由を抱いてここまで来たんだ
まだ終わらない旅路なんだ
いつしか想いは形になる
この真っ白に染まる朝
忘れられないまま
だから 諦めてしまうほど
この先沢山の
もうない 迷いはしないよ
かけがえのないもの
溢れてしまうよ
答えは君のその手の中に
離さないで
物語は一歩前へ
諦めてしまうほど
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Words that make me believe I want to be connected
Because we have already bid farewell to the us of yesterday
Faraway lightning bolt that passed through the blue spring
If I could just cry and look straight ahead
I wonder how much easier things would have become
A single glimmer of hope that shook my heart
I stopped asking for things I didn't have, I'm an incomplete human
Only a wonderful world holds the answer
I know that many regrets await me in the future, enough to make me want to give up
But no more, I won't be lost anymore
I will pile them up, enough to make even this wound seem dear
It's fine to stay just as I am, imperfect
Run, with that stride, run, let your voice roar
Embracing expectations and anxieties in equal measure
Illuminating the future I weave with you in the present
We, who don't know each other's faces or names
Are striking a single sound together
In this moment that feels like a miracle, like a prank
I fear the time flowing by in the blink of an eye
I fear continuing to exist just as I am
I cannot regain the time I've lost, but
It's fine to cry, just looking back at the past
Because only regrets and pain can affirm who you are
Will I forget when I become an adult?
The place where I made a promise with you
It's no longer there, I want to remember it
Everything you've piled up, enough to make even memories seem dear
It's fine to stay just as I am, imperfect
Let that voice ring out everywhere
I came this far holding onto a certain reason
It's a journey that hasn't ended yet
Someday, thoughts will take shape
In this morning dyed pure white
Still unable to forget
So, enough to make me want to give up
Many things ahead
Already gone, I won't be lost anymore
Something irreplaceable
It will overflow
The answer is in your hands
Don't let go
The story is one step ahead
Enough to make me want to give up

scenes.description: The camera pans to a solo VTuber performing the song "六兆年と一夜物語" (Rokuchounen to Ichiya Monogatari).

知らない知らない 僕は何も知らない
叱られた後のやさしさも
雨上がりの手の温もりも
でも本当は本当は本当は本当に寒いんだ

夢のひとつも見れないくせに
誰もしらないおとぎばなしは
夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
吐き出すような暴力と
蔑んだ目の毎日に
君はいつしか そこに立ってた
話しかけちゃだめなのに
「君の名前が知りたいな」
ごめんね 名前も 舌も無いんだ
僕の居場所は 何処にも無いのに
「一緒に帰ろう」 手を引かれてさ
知らない知らない 僕は何も知らない

でも本当は本当は本当は本当に温かいんだ

やっと見つけた 僕の居場所
誰もしらないおとぎばなしは
夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
知らない知らない 僕は何も知らない
鬼の子供として呪われても
でも本当は本当は本当は本当に温かいんだ
死にたい死にたい 僕は何で死にたい?

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In a village in a nameless era
There lived a nameless, young boy
It's a fairy tale that no one knows
From the moment he was born
He was treated as a cursed child, a demon's child
And received punishments his body couldn't bear
There wasn't really anything sad about it though
At sunset, his hand was pulled along
I don't know, I don't know, I know nothing at all
The kindness after being scolded
The warmth of a hand after the rain
But honestly, honestly, honestly, honestly, I'm cold
I won't die, I won't die, why won't I die?
Even though I can't even dream a dream
The fairy tale that no one knows
Was sucked into the sunset and disappeared
In the days of violence spat out
And eyes filled with contempt
You stood there before I knew it
Even though you shouldn't have spoken to me
"I want to know your name"
Sorry, I don't have a name or a tongue
Even though I have nowhere to belong
"Let's go home together," you said, taking my hand
I don't know, I don't know, I know nothing at all
Not even that you are no longer a child
The warmth of another person's hand, which I'm not used to
Honestly, honestly, honestly, honestly, it's warm
I won't die, I won't die, why won't I die?
I finally found a place to belong
The fairy tale that no one knows
Was sucked into the sunset and disappeared
I don't know, I don't know, I know nothing at all
Even when I am cursed as a demon
Honestly, honestly, honestly, honestly, it's warm
I want to die, I want to die, but I can't die
Because you are no longer here
I know, I know, I know everything now
That this story is just a fairy tale that no one knows
